title: BingoSplashCommunity
description: Hypixel Skyblock Bingo mod for the BingoSplashCommunity discord
body:
A simple QOL mod for Hypixel Skyblock Bingo. Includes ingame splash pings, timers for Bingo like commissions, NPC resets, and the Traveling Zoo.

Customization is available to allow you to choose how it looks and configure it to how you prefer.
